name: Social Needs Screening and Intervention Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for social determinants of health (SDOH) screening tools and interventions. Used in social needs screening and intervention (SNS-E) measure to identify members who received SDOH assessments.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Administration of patient-focused health risk assessment instrument with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Administration of caregiver-focused health risk assessment instrument with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Administration of a standardized, evidence-based social determinants of health risk assessment tool
Screening, brief intervention and referral to treatment (SBIRT) for substance abuse (includes screening for SDOH)
Screening to determine the appropriateness of consideration of an individual for participation in a specified program
Protocol for Responding to and Assessing Patients Assets Risks and Experiences (PRAPARE) total score
Accountable Health Communities (AHC) HRSN screening tool
